parameters.apprise_url_plus: zulip://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.botname_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.organization_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Zulip destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise zulip:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

botname_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip botname

organization_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip organization

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip token
